idea-plugin.name: Klib Lens
idea-plugin.description:
Klib Lens

Enhance the readability of decompiled Kotlin Library (.klib / .knm) metadata files. Klib Lens intercepts the default viewer and provides a much more idiomatic and human-readable Kotlin source view.

Key Features

  • Simplify FQNs: Cleans up kotlin.* and .internal.* prefixes for Standard Library classes.
  • Remove Noise: Strips out /* compiled code */, /* from: ... */, and empty method bodies automatically generated by the compiler.
  • Restore Annotations: Reconstructs complex annotation values and arguments directly from the metadata structure.
  • Cleaner Modifiers: Removes redundant public and final keywords for a more idiomatic look.
  • K2 Ready: Fully compatible with both K1 and K2 compiler modes.

Perfect for multiplatform and native code exploration!
